text_block_list.text:
Pre-race interviews are being shown on TV during
breaks in the coverage of the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As an Umamusume of the Mejiro family, I can't
lose this race.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to do my very best. Because, well, I'm
going to win the spring Tenno Sho!

The small screen shows a montage of clips of the
racers training vigorously.

Mihono Bourbon, who has been fixated on the
screen, suddenly stands up.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have identified a surge in power within me. A
strong "desire to win" has overcome me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
It is unusual for me to be so mentally stimulated
before a race.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In other words, I'm anxious that this will have an
effect on my performance. Your advice, please,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
choice_data_list:
That desire to win will end up helping you,
Bourbon.

text_block_list.text:
I tell her that her feelings will give her strength
and remind her to stay relaxed while running.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your simple and clear explanation.
I now understand that my reaction is a positive
one.
She settles down and quietly turns off the TV.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I have nothing more to be anxious
about. I will definitely be victorious.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: In particular, I won't lose to McQueen... or Rice.

Mihono Bourbon looks straight ahead, her eyes
burning with passion.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Yes, Trainer. I'll be on my way.
